data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies and limits user choices to enhance decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menus and concise options in the application interface.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs user interface elements for ease of interaction based on size and distance.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily accessible play and pause buttons.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Ensures visually pleasing designs to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Carefully chosen color scheme, typography, and iconography.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns user experience with common patterns and expectations from similar services.
data.technical_spec: Familiar navigation layout akin to music player norms.

data.title: Feedback Principle
data.description: Provides immediate feedback to user actions for better interaction understanding.
data.technical_spec: Visual and auditory cues for actions like song selection and volume changes.
